description: Authoritative Launch 1 curriculum plus metadata-only post-launch roadmap. Beta denotes declared teachable scope under verification; Coming Soon entries expose scope without learner content.

status_policy.coming-soon: Approved roadmap entry with no learner-facing lessons.
status_policy.beta: Scope, sources, graph and assessments are declared; executable and editorial verification is in progress.
status_policy.verified: Required coverage, examples, assessments, accessibility and source audit have passed and received admin sign-off.
status_policy.retired: No new enrollments; existing learners follow an explicit migration or archival policy.

tracks.title: Programming Foundations
tracks.summary: Computing mental models, problem decomposition, program tracing, tooling and learning habits for absolute beginners.

tracks.title: C
tracks.summary: C23-oriented beginner-to-intermediate programming with pointers, memory, modular builds and defensive practices.

tracks.title: C++
tracks.summary: Modern C++20 baseline with C++23 notes, value semantics, RAII, STL, classes and generic programming.

tracks.title: Java
tracks.summary: JDK 21 LTS beginner-to-intermediate Java, object modeling, collections, generics, streams, I/O, tests and builds.

tracks.title: Python
tracks.summary: Python 3.14 beginner-to-intermediate programming, core data structures, functions, modules, objects, iterators, typing and tests.

tracks.title: HTML
tracks.summary: Semantic, accessible HTML documents, forms, media, metadata and validation.

tracks.title: CSS
tracks.summary: Cascade, layout, responsive design, reusable styling, animation and accessible visual design.

tracks.title: JavaScript
tracks.summary: ECMAScript language fluency, browser APIs, DOM, modules, asynchronous work, HTTP and tests.

tracks.title: React
tracks.summary: Component-driven React applications using props, state, hooks, forms, routing, data fetching and tests.

tracks.title: Data Structures and Algorithms
tracks.summary: Comprehensive shared DSA concepts with implementation and assessment parity in the learner-selected language.

tracks.title: Git and Developer Tooling
tracks.summary: Terminal, Git, collaboration, debugging, build and quality workflows used across all code tracks.

tracks.title: AI Foundations
tracks.summary: AI literacy, data and model fundamentals, evaluation, responsible use, generative AI and small Python experiments.

tracks.title: Advanced C
tracks.summary: Post-intermediate C systems topics planned as a separately reviewed and published track.

tracks.title: Advanced C++
tracks.summary: Post-intermediate modern C++ topics planned as a separately reviewed and published track.

tracks.title: Advanced Java
tracks.summary: Post-intermediate Java platform topics planned as a separately reviewed and published track.

tracks.title: Advanced Python
tracks.summary: Post-intermediate Python language topics planned as a separately reviewed and published track.

tracks.title: Advanced React
tracks.summary: Advanced React architecture and performance topics planned beyond the Launch 1 intermediate scope.

tracks.title: Qt
tracks.summary: Qt desktop application development planned only after verified intermediate C++ capability.

tracks.title: NumPy
tracks.summary: Array programming with NumPy planned only after verified intermediate Python capability.

tracks.title: pandas
tracks.summary: Tabular data analysis with pandas planned after Python and the NumPy roadmap foundation.

tracks.title: Spring Framework
tracks.summary: Spring Framework fundamentals planned only after verified intermediate Java capability.

tracks.title: Spring Boot
tracks.summary: Production-oriented Spring Boot applications planned after Java and Spring fundamentals.

governance.missing_promised_topic: Treat as a versioned coverage defect in the existing track.
governance.new_extension: Create a separately scoped and prerequisite-gated track.
